channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bins consistently fly tipped on Evering Road so bin staff do not empty, 9th July
item.description:
These residential bins are opposite Rectory Road station, so people often dump rubbish in them as they are exposed. They are now overflowing, so have not been collected for the last two weeks. This is not the residents' fault, so could they be emptied ASAP

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working on Coleman Road opposite Dowlas Street again, 9th July
item.description:
Street light not working on Coleman Road opposite Dowlas Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coleman Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Clothes Basket Dumped on Pavement, 9th July
item.description:
An unwanted clothes basket has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 81. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durham Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Commercial Fridge Dumped on Pavement, 9th July
item.description:
A large unwanted commercial fridge has been left dumped on the pavement next to number 46. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durham Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crystal Palace Park Road SE26 / High Street junction., 9th July
item.description:
Crystal Palace Park Road SE26 / High Street junction. Between Thicket Road junction and pedestrian crossing (traffic lights) there are 3 of green boxes – the centre one of said boxes graffiti tagged. Google Streetview: https://www.google.com/maps/@51.41872,-0.061454,3a,15.9y,158.39h,85.57t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1sAwzr3eQCvPQ5u_AdDAps5w!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D4.430390697221327%26panoid%3DAwzr3eQCvPQ5u_AdDAps5w%26yaw%3D158.38710042128065!7i16384!8i8192?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDcwNy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Table Dumped in Communal Bin Store, 9th July
item.description:
A large unwanted table has been left dumped in the communal bin store, and is partially blocking access to it. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.
